scope: Add task_stuck_total Prometheus counter (labels: channel, reason)
Add background watchdog task: every 60s scan route_executions for tasks running > 360s, auto-cancel them
Increment task_stuck_total when heartbeat or watchdog detects stuck task
acceptance_criteria: 1. _heartbeat_iteration wraps route_chat with asyncio.wait_for(timeout=300) — TimeoutError caught, logs warning, lock released
2. task_stuck_total Counter exists with labels [channel, reason] — incremented on heartbeat timeout
3. _watchdog_loop() background task starts in lifespan when MUSU_CEO_HEARTBEAT_ENABLED=true
4. _watchdog_loop cancels route_executions with status='running' AND age > 360s, sets status='failed'
6. All 199 existing pytest tests still pass
8. New test: watchdog cancels stuck route_executions
done_definition: Heartbeat no longer permanently blocks when route_chat hangs; watchdog auto-cancels tasks stuck >360s; Prometheus counter tracks stuck events; all tests pass.
